value.message: External tester groups cannot be notified via this endpoint. Create a custom access link with tester_group_id to notify them.
param is missing or the value is empty or invalid: test_build_id
The provided artifact cannot be used for tester group notifications, id: `e8469a17-5fe8-4d59-abad-52fc8a94e729`
The provided artifact cannot be used for tester group notifications, id: `b6690148-4e1f-4d66-a554-d25c24397a42`
The provided artifact cannot be used for tester group notifications, id: `dde4bfd4-c9c3-4fb8-bb1c-85b34aaf8da9`
Invalid type: `not-a-valid-type`. Valid values are: internal, external.
The resource is of type `internal` and cannot be accessed with type `external`.
You have no permissions to notify the tester group. Only Admins, Owners and Workspace Admins can send notifications to the tester groups.
